name: Swordtail
author: Poki
description: Swordtail is an action-packed adventure game where you defend your kingdom from waves of deadly monsters. Gather essential resources, craft powerful items, and upgrade your gear to survive increasingly intense challenges. Jump into two-player mode to join forces with a friend for double the excitement. Can you withstand the monster invasion and become the ultimate defender in Swordtail? How do I play Swordtail? Move: WASD, Arrow Keys, or clicking and draging with the mouse Pause: Escape Get close enough to resources or enemies to harvest or attack! Who created Swordtail? Swordtail is created by 7Spot Games. Play their other games on Poki: BoxRob , BoxRob 2 , BoxRob 3 , Cow Bay , Cow Castle , Duo Survival , Duo Survival 2 , Duo Survival 3 , Duo Vikings , Duo Vikings 2 , Duo Vikings 3 , Elixpur Idle , Lands of Blight , Moving Truck , Moving Truck: Bounty , Moving Truck: Construction , Ninja Mouse , Olly the Paw , Truck Loader , Truck Loader 2 , Truck Loader 3 , Truck Loader 4 , Truck Loader 5 , ZOOM-BE , ZOOM-BE 2 , ZOOM-BE 3 , ZomboTag and Zomrage ! How can I play Swordtail for free? You can play Swordtail for free on Poki. Can I play Swordtail on mobile devices and desktop? Swordtail can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play Swordtail with my friend? Yes! Swordtail has local multiplayer, so you can play with a friend on the same computer!
